export_metadata.notes: Generated for App upgrade integration testing only. This is not final guidance.

known_issues: Firmware version applicability is unknown; tested versions are recorded only in evidence and firmware_details.
Other RT-AX86U hardware revisions, regions, and firmware variants are unknown.
Web Recovery page was not observed during the tested TTL=100 state.
Active TFTP / router-pulls-firmware was not observed or supported by this evidence.
LAN1 was used successfully, but LAN2-LAN4 were not evaluated.
Exact button hold duration was not recorded.
TFTP filename requirement is unknown; 388102.w is only an accepted filename example.
Configuration retention was observed once but is not guaranteed.
risk_warnings: Upload completion does not mean recovery is complete.
Wait several minutes after upload before power action; the observed run waited more than 5 minutes.
A normal power cycle may be required before DHCP and admin UI return.
Configuration retention is not guaranteed. Back up configuration before recovery.
Do not judge recovery success by ping or TTL alone.
Web Recovery was not observed for this tested state.
Use Passive TFTP PUT only; Active TFTP router-pulls-firmware is not supported by this evidence.
Use model-matched official ASUSWRT-Merlin RT-AX86U firmware and extract the .w image before upload.
This candidate is not final and must not be generalized to RT-AC86U, stock ASUSWRT, other hardware revisions, or other regions.
risk_and_scope.review_notes: Reviewed-candidate migration approved by Owner on 2026-05-26. This is reviewed-candidate only, not final. All core groups remain observation-only. Do not write final without separate explicit Owner approval.

firmware_preparation.version_selection_guidance: Use official ASUSWRT-Merlin firmware explicitly matching RT-AX86U. Extract the .w firmware image from the archive before TFTP upload.
firmware_preparation.risk_warning: This candidate evidence covers ASUSWRT-Merlin on one RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 unit. It does not prove stock ASUSWRT, other hardware revisions, other regions, or all firmware versions behave the same.

macos_preflight.local_network_permission_warning: Initial macOS Local Network permission denial can appear as sendto() No route to host.

physical_setup.required_lan_port: LAN1 observed; other LAN ports were not evaluated.
physical_setup.led_indicator: Slow-flashing power LED plus LAN1 activity was observed during the recovery-like state.

readiness.readiness_warning: Ping and TTL can support readiness but must not be the sole success or failure signal.

transfer.client_behavior_requirement: Use Passive TFTP PUT/WRQ to 192.168.1.1:69 and follow the router ACK source port. In the observed run, ACKs stayed on source port 69.

post_upload.user_warning_after_upload: Firmware upload finished, but recovery is not complete. Wait several minutes before any power action. In the observed run, DHCP and admin UI returned only after a normal power cycle, then the Mac used DHCP and opened the gateway 192.168.50.1.

known_recovery_variants: Configuration retained after TFTP recovery in this single RT-AX86U attempt
Manual power cycle required after post-upload wait before DHCP/admin returned

stop_lines: Do not present this export as final production guidance.
Do not generalize observations from this profile to other ASUS models.
Do not claim all hardware or firmware versions are covered.
Do not store firmware binaries or private local file paths.
Do not infer configuration retention or factory reset from transfer success.

source_trace.notes: Personal testing source. Scope is limited to the tested RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 unit and ASUSWRT-Merlin firmware family.
Supports Passive TFTP PUT for the tested unit. Active TFTP router-pulls-firmware was not observed in passive capture.
Configuration retention is this-run evidence only and must not be promised.
Review report only. Does not approve final publication.
